name: Lowry Farmers' Market
notes: On-file website http://www.hangar2lowry.com/farmers-market returns 404. The parent domain www.hangar2lowry.com is live (Hangar 2 dining district site) but no longer has any page or link referencing a farmers market. www.lowrybeergarden.com (the beer garden the market was located next to) also has no farmers market mention. A Facebook page at https://www.facebook.com/LowryFarmersMarket/ appears to be the market's official page by name match, but its content could not be accessed (Facebook blocks unauthenticated fetch) so no facts could be verified from it and it was not included as a sourced field. Third-party aggregators (Yelp, nfmd, rootseller, macaronikid, topfarmersmarkets, foraged, farmersmarket.net) consistently describe the market as located at 7581 E. Academy Blvd., Denver, CO 80230 (Hangar 2 parking lot near Lowry Beer Garden), open Tuesdays roughly 4:00-7:30/8:00pm, seasonally June-September, selling produce/baked goods/crafts/flowers/honey, but per instructions these were not used to populate fields since they are not legitimate official sources and could not be cross-verified against an official site. The market was also absent from a current (2026) comprehensive Denver-area farmers market roundup (milehighonthecheap.com), raising some doubt about whether it is still operating. Recommend a follow-up check by phone (303-587-8721 / 303-685-8133, numbers vary by source) or by viewing the Facebook page directly to confirm current status and hours.
